---
title: "Admiral Sir Houston Stewart"
---

## Admiral Sir Houston Stewart

**Dates:** (1791-1875)

### Description

naval officer

### Biography

He was second in command of the Black Sea fleet in 1855.

### Letters

- Letter from January 2, 1897
- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from Feb 19  [1894]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
